title: 60 Pcs 25mm Mini Binder Clips, Black Metal Clips, Small Foldback Paper Clips Clamp
features: ❤【Quality and Size】 Paper clips kit contain 60 pack small binder clips, each size is 25mm(1 inch), small but save space.
❤【Premium Material】 Foldback clips are made of strong metal which is sturdy enough to keep the paper tight, durable and reusable.
❤【Simple but Effective】 File money clips hold files together to prevent papers from slipping or pulling out, more useful than stapling.
❤【Wide Application】 Paper clamp can help you work easier and make your work plan-able, suitable for any location, school, office, workplace and home.
❤【Satisfaction Guarantee】 If you're not satisfied with your purchase, please contact us in time, we will provide you with a refund or replacement.
description: Product Description kuou 25mm Mini Binder Clips, Black Metal Bulldog Clips, Extra Small Foldback Paper Clips Clamp Specification: Material: Metal Size: 25mm Width Color: Black Quantity: 60 pieces HIGH QUALITY BINDER CLIPS: Strong metal clamps, Opaque black finish, Shiny silver lever arms,Durable and reusable. SMALL BULLDOG CLIPS: 25mm/ 1inch in width, Mini metal binder clips, Small but save space. MULTI-FUNCTION: Mini binder clips open easily and clamp down tightly on documents; Simple but effective, Fold to secure small amount of paper securely. WIDE APPLICATION: Metal bulldog clips are suitable for school, office, workplace and home; Help you work easier and make your work plan-able. kuou 84 Pcs Bulldog Clips, 15mm Small Binder Clips kuou 500 Pcs Coloured Paper Clips, Plastic-Coated Metal Paperclips kuou 200 Pcs Coloured Paper Clips, Plastic-Coated Metal Paperclips kuou 100 Pcs Coloured Paper Clips, Plastic-Coated Metal Paperclipss kuou 12 Pack Black Large Bulldog Clips Hinge Paper Clips Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 341 4.6 out of 5 stars 434 4.5 out of 5 stars 189 4.5 out of 5 stars 235 — Price — no data £7.99 £ 7 . 99 — no data — no data — no data Material Metal Vinyl + Metal Vinyl + Metal Vinyl + Metal Sprayed Metal Quantity 84 Pcs 500 Pcs 200 Pcs 100 Pcs 12 Pcs Size 15mm 33mm/1.3inch 28mm/1.1inch 50mm/2inch 77mm/3inch
